ai_summary: **Executive Summary: Akums Drugs & Pharmaceuticals Ltd. 22nd Annual General Meeting Proceedings**  Akums Drugs & Pharmaceuticals Ltd.'s 22nd AGM on July 10, 2026, highlighted a strong FY 2025-26 and strategic global expansion plans, including a Zambia Joint Venture and securing a long-term European CDMO contract. Key agenda items for shareholder approval included adopting financial statements, declaring a dividend, and approving remuneration revisions for two Managing Directors, reflecting a period of growth and proposed executive compensation adjustments. Crucially, this document details the proceedings and agenda but notably omits the actual voting outcomes for these resolutions, which limits immediate insight into specific shareholder approvals and their financial impacts.
